proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal by replying `continue`. Proposal establishes wide post-cutover system audit, direct safe cleanup, and follow-up issue generation. Roadmap origin #98.

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved discovery agreement by replying `continue`. Discovery found Temporal architecture is sound; remaining work is audit report, safe local cleanup, and follow-up issues for riskier post-cutover seams.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded. Validator verdict CAUTION; required changes resolved: no safeUpdateHandler symbol rename, PSW cleanup narrowed to comments with sourceVersion follow-up, provider-eval cleanup conditional, workflow-reachable file safety explicit. No unresolved conflict or contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep task graph by replying `approve`. Task graph has audit report, safe terminology cleanup, follow-up filing/reconciliation, and final verification. TDD intents reclassified with approval: first three not_applicable, final separate_verification.

execution.approval_evidence: All four planned tasks completed. Verification passed: pnpm run check, workflow-bundle-boundary test command, git diff --check, clean worktree. Validation passed with NO_DELTAS warning only, expected for audit/doc/comment cleanup change.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted implementation by replying `accept`. Delivered audit report, safe terminology cleanup, #98 repurpose, follow-up issues #106-#110, and verification evidence.

release.approval_evidence: User signed off with `sign off`. Release preflight: all prior gates done, all tasks done, strict validation passed with expected NO_DELTAS warning only, no conformance specs configured. Proceeding to archive.
